programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Couple Fulfills Their Dream of Moving to Cape Cod, MA Full-Time
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple buys an outdated beach house and lives there while completely gutting and renovating it into a dream home; they aim to fulfill their dream of having a waterfront property and living year-round on Cape Cod.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Full-On Fixer-Upper in St.Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: A couple realizes their budget balloons in relation to their plans for renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple wants to find a property on Fripp Island, N.C., and after finding a place, demolition leads to discoveries.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Couple Fulfills Their Dream of Moving to Cape Cod, MA Full-Time
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple buys an outdated beach house and lives there while completely gutting and renovating it into a dream home; they aim to fulfill their dream of having a waterfront property and living year-round on Cape Cod.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Full-On Fixer-Upper in St.Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: A couple realizes their budget balloons in relation to their plans for renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A family of four renovates a waterfront home on the canal in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Building a custom log guest home in Dandridge, Tenn.; as the cabin takes shape high in the hills of the Great Smoky Mountains, Mark visits one of the most famous log homes in the country; Johnny visits a candy store in Gatlinburg, Tenn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber-frame pavilion behind their showroom; Mark wants to build these outdoor living structures as kits using a notching system; while Ryan cooks, Mark visits the Sheriff's cabin in the Great Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to the hills of Pocahontas County, W.V., to try something new; working with repurposed factory beams and hand hewn timbers, they create a hybrid timber frame structure with a shed roof.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to New Salem, Tennessee to save a rare 19th century saddlebag style cabin before it's too late, battling the elements to preserve every last timber; Mark tours a home built from container cabins.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders are on the hunt for spare parts as they travel deep into one holler and high atop another to two different towns to save two different barns; along the way they find rare artifacts and visit a historic pioneer village.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to save a fine example of a Pennsylvania bank barn; crafted from white oak, the timberframe features a style of diagonal bracing they've never encountered before.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team attempt to save a historic cabin which was owned by a famous Maine politician, but they unearth a surprise that may derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team must renovate two A-frames in Maine's Sugarloaf Valley; with only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers; with limited resources, the team members work to incorporate the comforts of city living, then they discover a moldering water tank that may shut down the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: In New Sharon, Maine, Chase and his team help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond; he'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means it's going to need a lot of work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family; the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom; outside, the steep slope becomes a challenge just hours before the reveal.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team travels to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their shack into a relaxing retreat; the couple has big plans, which means the crew will be stretched with a $30,000 budget and four weeks to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: While getting ready for Lance's wedding in Augusta, Maine, Chase gets a call from a friend who has a log cabin stuck in her backyard; Chase sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and to present to Lance's bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters have a $50,000 budget to renovate a camp four-times the size of their usual builds; the client turns out to be a member of Ryan's favorite band; after weather delays, the crew asks for an extension on their deadline.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, Maine; they have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks, but they may not be able to overcome the challenges and finish the cabin before winter comes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: In Oakland, Maine, Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond that has been empty for 15 years; while it seems like a pretty straightforward renovation, starting a project this late in the season raises a lot of challenges.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A growing family needs more space at their camp on Pocasset Lake; while the crew handles the remodeling, layout revamp, wall replacement and dormer addition, Ashley and Ryan come up with a way to display the family's tradition of collecting rocks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A group of brothers who inherited a rugged hunting cabin from their father and his friends enlist the team to restore it and preserve its legacy.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Red Camp has been in the family for 60 years and is in need of some modern upgrades; the crew combats copper corrosion, critter nests and the dreaded camp curse, while raising the roof to give this waterside camp some upgrades.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A Damariscotta camp has a nice shell, but Chase and the team have to redesign the floorplan from the baseboards up for the family to get the getaway destination they had dreamed about.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A group of brothers who inherited a rugged hunting cabin from their father and his friends enlist the team to restore it and preserve its legacy.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Red Camp has been in the family for 60 years and is in need of some modern upgrades; the crew combats copper corrosion, critter nests and the dreaded camp curse, while raising the roof to give this waterside camp some upgrades.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A Damariscotta camp has a nice shell, but Chase and the team have to redesign the floorplan from the baseboards up for the family to get the getaway destination they had dreamed about.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A growing family needs more space at their camp on Pocasset Lake; while the crew handles the remodeling, layout revamp, wall replacement and dormer addition, Ashley and Ryan come up with a way to display the family's tradition of collecting rocks.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In Corry, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they've ever seen; along the way, Sherman shares farming stories with the barn owner, and Mark explores the nearby wetlands designed for conservation.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the guys create a rustic family gathering place in Franklin, Tenn. for a homeowner who loves 19th century hand-hewed craftsmanship; the property sits on a former horse farm that now serves as a dog rehabilitation camp.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Westmoreland County, Pa., to save a classic bank barn; if the guys don't save it now, it won't last another winter; along the way, the guys tour an 18th-century fort; Mark checks out a fully-operational bank barn.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character; she installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside but faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom; she creates a home theater and an immense deck and patio to turn the home into an entertaining showpiece.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles a large 1905 Colonial with seven sun porches; she overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet; unsupported floors and a strange noise during demolition slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.sub-title: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: In the second phase of Tamara's 1905 Colonial renovation, she creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet; her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling; she pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the 3100-square-foot shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room; the weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two brand new vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.sub-title: New Chapter for Family of Four
programme.desc: After looking at houses for months with no luck, Gayle and Tim Jackson need help to find a new place for their family of four that has four bedrooms and three bathrooms that, ideally, can be renovated within their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: After 17 years of working and living abroad in Pakistan, a couple returns home to Waco and enlists Chip and Jo to help renovate an 1890s farmhouse bought sight unseen; Chip and Jo implement the Moroccan and Scandinavian design styles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple move from Oregon to Waco, Texas, and enlist Chip and Jo to transform their bland, outdated home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Jo return to their roots and work to give a home a clean, new look, until Jo decides she wants her sister and brother-in-law to buy the house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.sub-title: Historic Home for a New Family
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna take on a historical project for Courtney and Joey Scrivano, who are ready to upgrade from their modest loft to a house where they can raise their new baby; the 1927 Tudor home is outdated and lacks a true master suite.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Fla., and because of their tight budget, they settle for a fixer upper and get their hands dirty taking on a lot of the work themselves.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, Ala., but have different opinions on what type of house they should get.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, Texas, but the house they find is need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple gears up to make the coastal paradise of Gulf Shores, Ala. their forever home with a house in the perfect place that needs big time renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Family Reno on the Beach in the Pacific Northwest
programme.desc: When this couple first emigrated from China, owning a beach house was the furthest thing from their minds. But decades later they're ready to join forces with their daughter and her husband to find the perfect property to renovate into their dream home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Dallas couple hunts for a beach retreat that's large enough to share with their family and friends in Cape San Blas, Fla.; they find a bargain bungalow close to the water; but it comes with the price of needing a lot of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Boho on the Beach in Texas
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beachside property in Surfside, Texas, to be their weekend getaway and a source of rental income, hoping to find a boho design to set their house apart.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: The Italian Job in Wildwood, NJ
programme.desc: A trio of weekend warriors pool their resources to buy a beach house that they can renovate for their big Italian family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.
